name: io.github.sowiedu/edict
description: A programming language designed for AI agents. No parser, no syntax — agents produce AST directly as JSON. Statically typed, effect-tracked, contract-verified via Z3, compiled to WASM.

tools.name: edict_schema
tools.description: Return the JSON Schema defining valid Edict AST programs. Supports full, minimal, and compact formats.

tools.name: edict_version
tools.description: Return compiler version and capability info.

tools.name: edict_examples
tools.description: Return 18 example programs as JSON ASTs.

tools.name: edict_validate
tools.description: Validate an Edict AST against the compiler's JSON schema without typing or compiling.

tools.name: edict_check
tools.description: Run the full semantic checker: name resolution, type checking, effect checking, contract verification.

tools.name: edict_compile
tools.description: Compile a semantically valid Edict AST into a WebAssembly module (base64).

tools.name: edict_run
tools.description: Execute a compiled WASM binary in a sandboxed runtime with configurable limits.

tools.name: edict_patch
tools.description: Apply surgical AST patches by nodeId, then re-check. Fix errors without resubmitting the entire AST.

tools.name: edict_errors
tools.description: Return machine-readable catalog of all structured error types.

tools.name: edict_lint
tools.description: Run non-blocking lint analysis and return quality warnings.

prompts.name: write_program
prompts.description: System prompt for writing a new Edict program from a task description.

prompts.name: fix_error
prompts.description: Prompt for fixing a structured Edict compiler error.

prompts.name: add_contracts
prompts.description: Prompt for adding pre/postcondition contracts for Z3 verification.

prompts.name: review_ast
prompts.description: Prompt for reviewing an Edict AST for quality issues.

resources.description: The full JSON Schema defining valid Edict AST programs.
All example programs as JSON ASTs.
Machine-readable catalog of all structured error types.
JSON Schema for the AST patch protocol.
